web_contents.description: Page visit tracking across all platforms
web_contents.volume_query: SELECT DATE(visited_timestamp) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM web_contents WHERE visited_timestamp BETWEEN %(start)s AND %(end)s GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt
web_contents.volume_query_by_platform: SELECT DATE(visited_timestamp) as dt, c.device_type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM web_contents wc JOIN clients c ON wc.client_id = c.id WHERE wc.visited_timestamp BETWEEN %(start)s AND %(end)s GROUP BY dt, c.device_type ORDER BY dt

ads.volume_query: SELECT DATE(created_at) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ads WHERE created_at BETWEEN %(start)s AND %(end)s GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt
known_failure_patterns: Image URL domain not in ad_server_domains whitelist

email.description: Email content capture from webmail providers
email.volume_query: SELECT DATE(wc.visited_timestamp) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM web_contents wc JOIN emails e ON wc.id = e.web_content_id WHERE wc.visited_timestamp BETWEEN %(start)s AND %(end)s GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt
known_failure_patterns: Content Security Policy blocking content script injection
Email preview modal not triggering capture

search_results.description: Google SERP capture including organic, paid, AI Overview, AI Mode
search_results.volume_query: SELECT DATE(sq.created_at) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM search_queries sq WHERE sq.created_at BETWEEN %(start)s AND %(end)s GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt
search_results.selectors_source: GET /api_v2/search-results/get_selectors (server-overridable, stored in GOOGLE_SELECTORS storage key)
known_failure_patterns: Google DOM restructure (AI Overview layout change)
Server selector override stale or incorrect
Redis dedup race condition with ap-server

social_posts.volume_query: SELECT DATE(created_at) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM posts WHERE created_at BETWEEN %(start)s AND %(end)s GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt
known_failure_patterns: Content script not injecting on SPA navigation
